title: Flow Management
subtitle: Manage and configure your application flows

table.emptyStateWithFilters: No flows match your filters. Try adjusting your search or filter criteria.

delete.title: Delete Flow
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone and will permanently remove the flow and all its associated data.

activate.title: Activate Flow
activate.description: Are you sure you want to activate "{name}"? This will make the flow available to users.

deactivate.title: Deactivate Flow
deactivate.description: Are you sure you want to deactivate "{name}"? This will make the flow unavailable to users.

emptyState.title: No flows found
emptyState.message: Get started by creating your first flow.

errorState.title: Failed to load flows
errorState.message: An error occurred while loading flows
